title: Friendship Compatibility Quiz
description: Find out what type of friendship you and your bestie really have
viralHook: We took the friendship quiz and got Soul Sisters... no surprise there!

props.title: What Kind of Friends Are You?
props.subtitle: Answer these 10 questions to discover your friendship type

questions.text: Your ideal weekend together looks like...

options.text: Deep conversations over coffee for hours
Spontaneous road trip to somewhere new
Co-working at a cute cafe then happy hour
Netflix marathon with snacks on the couch

questions.text: How do you handle conflict with each other?

options.text: We talk it out immediately and cry together
Laugh it off and move on quickly
Schedule a time to discuss it like adults
Go do something fun to blow off steam first

questions.text: Your go-to way to communicate is...

options.text: Hour-long voice notes pouring out feelings
Memes and TikToks sent at 2am
Quick check-in texts during the workday
Tagging each other in travel posts and bucket lists

questions.text: One of you gets a big promotion. Your reaction?

options.text: Tears of joy and a heartfelt letter about how proud you are
Plan a celebratory trip immediately
Strategize the next career move together over dinner
Order takeout and celebrate with a chill night in

questions.text: What do you argue about most?

options.text: Not sharing feelings soon enough
Who picks the next adventure
Scheduling conflicts and priorities
We honestly never argue
Lean on Me - Bill Withers
On Top of the World - Imagine Dragons
Unstoppable - Sia
Best Day of My Life - American Authors

questions.text: How long can you go without talking?

options.text: More than a day feels wrong
Weeks apart but pick up right where we left off
We literally talk every day during work hours
We sync up before and after every trip or event

questions.text: You'd describe your friendship vibe as...

options.text: Emotional, deep, and unbreakable
Wild, spontaneous, and full of stories
Ambitious, supportive, and goal-oriented
Easy, comfortable, and low-maintenance

questions.text: Your friend is going through a tough time. You...

options.text: Drop everything and show up with tissues and wine
Plan a surprise getaway to take their mind off things
Help them make an action plan to fix the situation
Invite them over for comfort food and zero pressure to talk
Living next door and raising our kids together
Still checking countries off our shared bucket list
Running a business or side project together
Same couch, same snacks, same us

soul.title: Soul Sisters
soul.description: Your bond runs deeper than the ocean. You finish each other's sentences, feel each other's pain, and your friendship is basically a lifelong commitment. You don't just have a friend - you have a soulmate in platonic form. People are honestly jealous of what you two have.
soul.shareText: We're Soul Sisters! Our friendship is basically a rom-com without the romance.

adventure.title: Adventure Buddies
adventure.description: Life is one big adventure with you two! Your camera rolls are full of epic moments, your passport stamps match, and boring is never in your vocabulary. You push each other out of your comfort zones and have the wildest stories to tell at parties.
adventure.shareText: We're Adventure Buddies! Our friendship runs on adrenaline and spontaneous plans.

work.title: Work Besties
work.description: You're the ultimate power duo. Whether you met at the office or just vibe on that hustle energy, you keep each other motivated, accountable, and winning. Your friendship is built on mutual respect, shared ambitions, and the occasional venting session about that one coworker.
work.shareText: We're Work Besties! Together we're basically unstoppable career machines.

chill.title: Chill Companions
chill.description: No drama, no pressure, just pure comfort. Your friendship is the human equivalent of a cozy blanket. You can sit in silence and it's not weird, you never have to perform, and just being together recharges your social battery. This is the friendship everyone needs but few find.
chill.shareText: We're Chill Companions! Our friendship is zero drama, maximum comfort.
